config.description: Options settable at the top level, per-package, and per-interface; values merge hierarchically. See https://vektra.github.io/mockery/latest/configuration/

all.description: Generate all interfaces for the specified packages

build-tags.description: Space-separated list of additional build tags to load packages

config.description: Location of the mockery config file

dir.description: Directory the mock file will be written to (templated, default "{{.InterfaceDir}}")

exclude-interface-regex.description: Interfaces matching include-interface-regex but also this are skipped (ignored if all is set)

exclude-subpkg-regex.description: Regexes of subpackages to exclude when recursive is true

filename.description: Name of the file the mock will reside in (templated, default "mocks_test.go")

force-file-write.description: Forcibly overwrite existing output files instead of failing

formatter.description: Formatter to run on the rendered template

generate.description: Selectively enable/disable generation of specific interfaces

include-auto-generated.description: Parse files that are themselves auto-generated (top-level or package-level only)

include-interface-regex.description: Only interface names matching this expression are generated (ignored if all is true)

inpackage.description: Override mockery's auto-detection of whether the mock is inside or outside the mocked interface's package

packages.description: Packages and interfaces to generate mocks for, keyed by Go import path

pkgname.description: Go package name given to the generated mock files (templated, default "{{.SrcPackageName}}")

recursive.description: Recursively search for all sub-packages and inject them into the config map

replace-type.description: Type replacements to apply when generating mocks

require-template-schema-exists.description: Fail if the template-data JSON schema could not be downloaded, instead of skipping validation

structname.description: Name of the generated interface implementation (templated, default "{{.Mock}}{{.InterfaceName}}")

template-data.description: Arbitrary options passed to the template; accepted keys vary per template

template-schema.description: URL of the JSON schema applied to template-data (templated, default "{{.Template}}.schema.json")

configs.description: Multiple named mock configs generated from the same interface

interfaces.description: Per-interface overrides, keyed by interface name

description: Config file for mockery, the Go mock generator (.mockery.yml / .mockery.yaml), driven via `go tool mockery` / `go:generate`. Mirrors the options documented at https://vektra.github.io/mockery/latest/configuration/; mockery has no officially published JSON Schema of its own, so this is a best-effort mirror of the docs table and may lag behind new releases.

_anchors.description: Unused by mockery; allowed so the file may define arbitrary YAML anchors

title: mockery configuration file
